name: Robert Martinez
subject: Question about joining a team
message: Hi, I'm a high school junior interested in rocketry and would love to join one of your teams. I have experience with model rockets and basic CAD design. What are the requirements to join, and when is the best time to apply? Thanks!

name: Jennifer Lee
subject: Sponsorship Opportunity
message: Hello Saguaro Strikers team, Our company is interested in sponsoring your organization. We specialize in aerospace materials and would like to discuss potential partnership opportunities. Could we schedule a call to discuss further? Best regards, Jennifer Lee, Corporate Relations Manager

name: Mark Thompson
subject: Educational Partnership
message: I'm a science teacher at Desert View High School and I'd like to explore opportunities for collaboration. We're interested in bringing our students to visit your facilities or arranging a speaker to come to our school. Please let me know if this would be possible.
response: Dear Mark, Thank you for reaching out! We'd love to partner with Desert View High School. We can arrange facility tours and speaker presentations. I'll send you our educational partnership packet via email. Best regards, Saguaro Strikers Team

name: Lisa Anderson
subject: Parent Question - Safety Concerns
message: My daughter is interested in joining your rocketry program, but I have some questions about safety protocols and supervision. What safety measures do you have in place? What kind of training do students receive?
